properties.name: Feature: Table Keep/Drop
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Adds a Keep High/Keep Low + amount field to Table records, so a table's dice roll can drop dice before the row lookup. Stock FGU already natively supports keep/drop notation (e.g. /die 3d6kl1) everywhere except Tables, which roll through a separate pathway with no concept of it -- this extension covers just that gap.
